characters.occupation_status: Subtitle editor -> council contractor -> whistleblower/Open Exchange co-lead.

state_transitions.change: Signs secrecy contract; KRW 7,000,000/month stipend.
Accepts immunity-linked NIS cooperation after raid detention.
Diverts KRW 5,920,000 and starts shadow harm ledger.
Held about 41 hours in Hongje; gives one backup node.
Leaks archive; loses stipend/residual income.
Indicted; passport seized; weekly reporting; KRW 300,000 daily cash cap.
Gets temporary escorted travel permit; runs Open Exchange Beta.

characters.physical_details: Silver hair, formal suits, controlled affect.

state_transitions.change: Locks Mercury timing (21:10/21:17); removes Ina from control.
Oversees Hongje coercive detention.
Council dissolved; assets frozen; audit/commission referrals.

characters.physical_details: Lean build, callused hands, recurring small burns.

state_transitions.change: Gives Ina a 14-day limited route key; names sister risk.
Warns Kwon about leak timing for sister transfer window.
Learns sister Suyon is missing after screenings.
Returns under explicit full-route transparency pact.

characters.physical_details: Performer posture; left-hand tremor under stress.
characters.occupation_status: Idol-actress under coercive debt contract; later public witness.

state_transitions.change: Option year and KRW 320,000,000 callable penalty activate.
Refuses forced anxiolytic after Jamsil; extracted to Busan.
Testifies; bookings canceled; KRW 9,800,000 hold applied.

characters.availability: Ch4-18; hidden in Busan in ch10-11.

characters.occupation_status: Church kitchen manager and covert bookkeeper.

state_transitions.change: Covers relief transfers through church-account rails.
Keeps true hymnbook cipher while decoy is seized.
Provides surviving dead-drop path and mirror contacts.

characters.physical_details: Former dockworker build; knee instability; nicotine-stained fingers.
characters.occupation_status: Semi-retired day laborer under rent and medical pressure.

state_transitions.change: Used as leverage during Ina detention.
Mild ischemic stroke; rehab starts.
Confesses 1993 Pier Seven relabeling role.

characters.physical_details: Deceased before chapter 1; present via recordings and notes.
characters.occupation_status: Former broadcaster/covert narrative operator, dead at opening.

state_transitions.change: Notebook/pager trail discovered after funeral.
B-214 locker yields S-11 confession and Bukjin ledger.

key_events.event: MiraeWave raid and NIS cooperation terms.
Jamsil panic; Ji-eun moved to Busan.
B-214 recovery, Hongje detention, Mercury casualties.
Archive leak, council dissolution, restrictions on Ina.
Open Exchange Beta and DMZ relay launch under permit dated 2027-12-19.

geography.primary_setting: Seoul metro (Mapo/Seongdong/Jamsil), with Busan refuge and DMZ relay.

key_locations.name: Mapo apartment and church basement
key_locations.details: Family debt pressure and triage shelter.

key_locations.name: Seongdong print-shop/Open Exchange
key_locations.details: Council HQ converted to public source-log site.

key_locations.name: Locker B-214 and DMZ relay site
key_locations.details: Evidence retrieval and chapter-18 public stream route.

distances: Mapo to Seongdong is about 35 minutes by late-night taxi.
Seoul to Busan by KTX is about 2.5 hours.
Central Seoul to Jamsil varies around 30-50 minutes in event traffic.
DMZ relay travel requires permit windows plus legal/latency buffers.

world_rules: Armistice security law penalizes unauthorized cross-border messaging/disclosure.
Institutions can freeze accounts, seize passports, and restrict travel before trial outcomes.
Narrative payloads move through deniable chains (USBs, brokers, burners, fan mirrors).
Debt, sedation clauses, and welfare-custody language are coercive control tools.

power_structure.mechanism: Secrecy contracts, stipend leverage, and legal exposure
Espionage threat, monitored cooperation, seizure authority
KRW 320,000,000 callability, option-year control, sedation clauses
Arrears filings, lock-change threats, collection deadlines
Dissolution, asset freeze, indictment terms, passport seizure

objects.name: S-11 cassette confession
objects.status: Digitized and leaked with checksum chain

objects.name: Bukjin ledger fragments
objects.status: Partially seized in chapter 14; surviving fragments released

objects.name: Hyejin hymnbook cipher
objects.status: Decoy seized; true path enabled final leak release

objects.name: Ji-eun rider evidence copy
objects.status: Used in hearing and Open Exchange records

debts.amount: KRW 58,000,000 at opening; KRW 57,700,000 by chapter 13
debts.deadline: Friday legal handoff windows with escalating minimums

income_sources.reliability: Volatile under sweeps and broker pressure

income_sources.amount: KRW 90,000,000 withdrawn; KRW 40,000,000 on hold; KRW 20,000,000 revoked; KRW 1,384,110 on hand

knowledge_state.knows: Council uses entertainment content for covert influence operations.
Payload markers correlate with named detentions/injuries.
NIS terms include monitored-device and rapid-summons constraints.
Her rider enables sedation and immediate debt acceleration.
S-11/Bukjin evidence implicates Kwon and exposes Eun-sook complicity.
Leak architecture; reports key parts to Kwon for sister safety window.
He took part in 1993 Pier Seven relabeling logistics.

environmental_constants: Seoul baseline: wet asphalt, fryer oil, diesel, fluorescent interiors.
Operational rooms are window-limited, equipment-loud, and surveillance-shaped.
Monsoon and winter weather repeatedly disrupt movement, signals, and emergency response.
